cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Cookie Summary card displays cookie, category, scan and pages-scanned details
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. Site has not yet been scanned (default state).

steps.content: Locate the Cookie summary card on the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Cookie summary card should be displayed on the Dashboard.

steps.content: Observe the Total cookies count on the card.
steps.expected: The Total cookies count should be displayed and should read 0 before any scan.

steps.content: Observe the Categories count on the card.
steps.expected: The Categories count should be displayed and should read 0 before any scan.

steps.content: Observe the Last successful scan value.
steps.expected: Last successful scan should display "Not available" before any scan has run.
Pages scanned should display 0 before any scan has run.
Next scan should display "Not scheduled" with a "Schedule" link beside it.

steps.content: Observe the bottom of the card.
steps.expected: A "Manage cookies" link should be displayed at the bottom of the card.

steps.content: Run an initial scan of the site and return to the Dashboard.
steps.expected: Total cookies and Categories counts should update to reflect the scan results, and Last successful scan should display the scan date/time.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Schedule link on the Cookie Summary card opens the schedule-scan upgrade nudge on a free plan
cases.preconditions: User is the Account Owner on a free (unpaid) plan.

steps.content: On the Cookie summary card, locate the "Schedule" link next to Next scan (shown with a premium icon for free users).
steps.expected: The "Schedule" link with a premium icon should be displayed on the Cookie summary card.
The Schedule scan nudge pop-up should be displayed (scan scheduling is a Pro/Ultimate gated feature).

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the schedule-scan nudge pop-up displays the upsell content and upgrade CTA
cases.preconditions: User is the Account Owner on a free (unpaid) plan. The schedule-scan nudge pop-up has been opened from the Cookie summary card Schedule link.

steps.content: Observe the body content of the schedule-scan nudge pop-up.
steps.expected: The pop-up should describe scheduling monthly cookie scans and indicate the feature is available in Pro and Ultimate plans.

steps.content: Locate the upgrade CTA button on the pop-up.
steps.expected: An upgrade CTA button should be displayed ("Try Pro for Free" or "Upgrade now" depending on plan/build).
The upgrade page should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Schedule link on the Cookie Summary card opens the Cookie Manager on a paid plan
cases.preconditions: User is on a paid plan (Pro or higher).

steps.content: On the Cookie summary card, locate the "Schedule" link next to Next scan (no premium icon on paid plans).
steps.expected: The "Schedule" link should be displayed without a premium icon.
The Cookie Manager page should be displayed (where scans can be scheduled).

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Manage cookies link on the Cookie Summary card opens the Cookie Manager

steps.content: On the Cookie summary card, locate the "Manage cookies" link at the bottom of the card.
steps.expected: The "Manage cookies" link should be displayed at the bottom of the card.
